markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the kickoff and logistics of a social media content pilot project between GrowthX and Etleap.](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX will pilot Etleap's social media content services, starting with 1-2 clients (including GrowthX itself) at \~$3K/month for 3-5 posts/week](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [The process involves quick feedback cycles, writer/strategist collaboration, and potential for AI-enhanced workflows](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Both parties are open to evolving the partnership, including white-labeling or acquisition possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Quality control and maintaining human curation are crucial as AI tools are integrated](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Topics

### Project Kickoff Process

  - [Etleap to review content after receiving survey responses](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Set up shared Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Schedule call to discuss questions, process, and start iterations](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Aim for quick feedback cycles to maintain momentum](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Pricing and Scale

  - [Typical pricing range: $3,000-$5,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Agreed on $3K/month for pilot, with potential to scale to 4-5 clients](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Jason to anchor at $5K when discussing with potential clients, noting flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation

  - [Focus on balancing efficiency with quality control](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Writers to transition from creation to review roles as AI tools improve](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Explore integrating expert reviews for specialized content (e.g., security)](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Consider adding infographics and diverse content types to offerings](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

### Partnership Evolution

  - [Potential for white-labeling Etleap's services under GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Openness to acquisition scenarios, leveraging GrowthX's AI expertise](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Explore expanding services beyond social media (e.g., SEO, case studies, web dev)](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

### Quality Control and AI Integration

  - [Maintain human curation to preserve competitive advantage](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Balance automation with preserving writer skills and judgment](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Address potential quality drift through human review processes](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

### Client Management

  - [Binary outcomes: clients either see immediate value or resist content style](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Strategies for handling resistant clients: showcase success stories, compromise on content types](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Tailor content to client's persona and voice while maintaining effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to send survey responses and onboard Marcel and Tiago](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Etleap to review responses and prepare for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to discuss questions and process details](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Jason to explore additional potential clients for the pilot](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Set up shared Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Begin content creation and posting with quick feedback cycles](https://fathom.video/share/V_G_HuE4h4Vcv7H9EweugsU2c_XkohfX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
